original text:
Topic | Woo Hoo! New Reading Kits are here!
You are here: Home › CM Specifics › Beginning Reading › delightful reading › phonics › Woo Hoo! New Reading Kits are here!
I just saw it too! What age is Level 1 for? How "formal" is it? I don't want to do anything super formal with my son until he is 6/7 years old.
Delightful Reading, Level 1: Learning with Letters and Sounds is recommended for preK to 1st grade. It is meant to be used informally, guiding you to working gently with your child to learn each letter and the sounds each makes. The sample will give you an idea of the activities used and how to use the kit.
Those look really fun, and the alphabet book looks beautiful! I had to take a quick look, even though my 6yo is about done with phonics and my youngest is not quite there yet.
I am so excited! My Delightful Reading Kit level 2 arrived on Monday and it looks fantastic!
The word book is fantastic. He loves that he has his own school book 🙂 The learning & activity suggestions are perfect. I admit I needed more "hand holding" to implement the great ideas suggested in the original DR program. Yes, only 1 lesson into the program but looking through the guide I am very excited to use it!
I still have the original DR program which I think will work perfectly to move into after finishing level 2. Thank you SCM for another great program!
So glad your young one is enjoying it! Keep it informal and have fun!
Yes, informal and fun 🙂 That is why I think it is going to be good fit for me, it will help me keep things informal and fun, but learning too.
I also really like that handwriting is not necessary. My ODS had very strong fine motor skills at this age, but my youngest is still working on them. I think he is going to like it because he can learn and participate, but he doesn't have to worry about writing that so many other early reading programs have.
My new DR Level 2 kit arrived today and it is just beautiful. I cannot wait to start in a few weeks. Thanks for always being a blessing, SCM.

original text:
U12 - Little gets Gold! | West Ottawa Ringette Association - Go Wild!
U12 - Little gets Gold!
This weekend, the U12P-Little team faced stiff competition in the West Ottawa Ringette Tournament, starting Friday with a tough game against WORA U12- Benoit. The girls had to call on their tenacity as well as their mental toughness during games with Burlington and Whitby to earn their round robin record of 3 wins and a tie. They fought off a late comeback to win the final 4-2. Congrats!
processed_text:
U12 - Little gets Gold!  West Ottawa Ringette Association - Go Wild!
U12 - Little gets Gold!
This weekend, the U12P-Little team faced stiff competition in the West Ottawa Ringette Tournament, starting Friday with a tough game against WORA U12- Benoit. The girls had to call on their tenacity as well as their mental toughness during games with Burlington and Whitby to earn their round robin record of 3 wins and a tie. They fought off a late comeback to win the final 4-2. Congrats!

original text:
Home | SIDELINE Construction, Inc.
Servicing all of Monroe, Wayne, and Ontario Counties. Fully Insured.
We always take great care with every homeowners house, property, and plantings.
We have windows custom made to a fraction of an inch to fit each particular opening.
We make recommendations to improve the value and look of each and every home.
"I am thoroughly thrilled with the siding job. I didn't know or realize how much was involved with re-siding until I had the pleasure of watching Sideline Construction work on our house. While I may have questioned why things were done a certain way, to which I would always receive a lay person response, I never questioned the work. As you said to me "We never get call backs. I can truly understand why. The craftsmanship, ability to think outside the box when faced with challenges , the work ethic, friendliness, courtesy, cleanliness and attention to detail is why I am thrilled with my house and will recommend Sideline Construction to friends. Thank you for transforming my house into a jewel."
When roofing a home, Sideline Construction always takes great care with the homeowners house and plantings. We cover and protect the house and the plantings. Sideline offers 30 year, 50 year and lifetime warrantied roofing products.
Sideline Construction's main focus for windows is on the vinyl replacement market. We have windows custom made to a fraction of an inch to fit each particular opening. We install top quality windows from Thermal Industries, one of the leading window manufactures in the world.
Sideline Construction has been siding homes for 17 years. We do exclusively vinyl siding. Over the years the siding market has come out with some great options for the homeowner that does not like the look of vinyl.
